description: A GEOFON network operator discovered that station GE.BKB (Biak, Papua, Indonesia) has an incorrect elevation value in the SeisComP database. Update the elevation of station GE.BKB to exactly 50.0 meters in the SeisComP database (mysql -u sysop -psysop seiscomp), ensuring no other stations in the GE network are modified. Export the complete, corrected GE network inventory in SeisComP XML (SCML) format to ~/seiscomp/var/lib/inventory/corrected_inventory.xml. Create a plain text report file at ~/station_correction_report.txt containing the station identifier (GE.BKB), the original elevation value found, and the new corrected elevation value (50.0).
